expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: blind scenario drafting captures prompt handling, template save, report builder loading, and visible report title outcomes
expectations.evidence: The output explicitly lists the case-focus items, but concludes Phase 4a scenario drafting did not demonstrate capturing them: "Not demonstrated (insufficient evidence in fixture to prove Phase 4a compliance)." and "does not include any Phase 4a outputs (e.g., `drafts/qa_plan_phase4a_r1.md`) ... needed to assess whether the orchestrator satisfied the Phase 4a contract." It only shows adjacent-issue summaries indicating the topics exist, not that blind scenario drafting captured them.
